links.title: Event log (recent events)
links.tooltip: Chronological feed of individual lease events for debugging

panels.description: Total DHCPv4 requests in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS "Requests" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')

panels.title: DHCPv4 requests

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(countIf(success = 1) * 100.0 / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS success_pct FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')

panels.description: Failed DHCPv4 requests in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(success = 0) AS "Failures" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')

panels.title: DHCPv4 failures

panels.description: Total DHCPv6 requests in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS "Requests" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')

panels.title: DHCPv6 requests

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(countIf(success = 1) * 100.0 / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS success_pct FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')

panels.description: Failed DHCPv6 requests in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(success = 0) AS "Failures" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')

panels.title: DHCPv6 failures

panels.description: Request volume over time, split by protocol version and outcome. Failures are dashed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, countIf(success = 1) AS "DHCPv4 success", countIf(success = 0) AS "DHCPv4 failure" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, countIf(success = 1) AS "DHCPv6 success", countIf(success = 0) AS "DHCPv6 failure" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: DHCP requests over time — v4 vs v6 (success & failure)

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(failure_reason, 'unknown') AS reason, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY reason ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT coalesce(failure_reason, 'unknown') AS reason, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY reason ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10

panels.description: Clients with the most failed requests in the selected time range — usually devices with no reservation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'v4' AS "Proto", coalesce(mac_address, '?') AS "Client", count() AS "Failures", arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArray(3)(coalesce(failure_reason, 'unknown')), ', ') AS "Reasons" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY "Client" UNION ALL SELECT 'v6' AS "Proto", coalesce(mac_address, coalesce(client_id, '?')) AS "Client", count() AS "Failures", arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArray(3)(coalesce(failure_reason, 'unknown')), ', ') AS "Reasons" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY "Client") ORDER BY "Failures" DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top failing clients (v4 + v6)

panels.description: Most recent failed requests across both protocols, newest first.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT timestamp AS "Time", 'v4' AS "Proto", host_name AS "Server", coalesce(message_type, '') AS "Type", toString(relay_addr) AS "Relay", coalesce(mac_address, '') AS "MAC / Client ID", coalesce(failure_reason, '') AS "Reason" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') UNION ALL SELECT timestamp AS "Time", 'v6' AS "Proto", host_name AS "Server", message_type AS "Type", toString(relay_addr) AS "Relay", coalesce(mac_address, coalesce(client_id, '')) AS "MAC / Client ID", coalesce(failure_reason, '') AS "Reason" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')) ORDER BY "Time" DESC LIMIT 200

panels.title: Recent failures (v4 + v6)

targets.rawSql: SELECT mac_address AS "MAC address", count() AS "Total", countIf(success = 1) AS "OK", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed", round(countIf(success = 1) * 100.0 / nullIf(count(), 0), 1) AS "Success %", max(timestamp) AS "Last seen" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND mac_address IS NOT NULL AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY mac_address ORDER BY "Total" DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT mac_address AS "MAC address", count() AS "Total", countIf(success = 1) AS "OK", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed", round(countIf(success = 1) * 100.0 / nullIf(count(), 0), 1) AS "Success %", max(timestamp) AS "Last seen" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND mac_address IS NOT NULL AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY mac_address ORDER BY "Total" DESC LIMIT 25

panels.description: Requests per relay agent, split into successful and failed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(relay_addr) AS relay, countIf(success = 1) AS "OK", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY relay ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: DHCPv4 requests by relay

panels.description: Requests per relay agent, split into successful and failed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(relay_addr) AS relay, countIf(success = 1) AS "OK", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY relay ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: DHCPv6 requests by relay

panels.description: Request volume per server, both protocols.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, concat(host_name, ' (v4)') AS server, count() AS requests FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time, server ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, concat(host_name, ' (v6)') AS server, count() AS requests FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time, server ORDER BY time

panels.title: Requests per server

panels.description: How reservations were found ('unmatched' = no reservation found).

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(match_method, 'unmatched') AS method, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY method ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: DHCPv4 match method

panels.description: How reservations were found ('unmatched' = no reservation found).

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(match_method, 'unmatched') AS method, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY method ORDER BY n DESC

panels.title: DHCPv6 match method

panels.description: Which extractor produced each successful match, as 'version method/extractor'. Only matched requests are counted.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT concat('v4 ', coalesce(match_method, '?'), '/', coalesce(extractor_used, '?')) AS "Extractor", count() AS "Matches" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND match_method IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "Extractor" UNION ALL SELECT concat('v6 ', coalesce(match_method, '?'), '/', coalesce(extractor_used, '?')) AS "Extractor", count() AS "Matches" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND match_method IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "Extractor") ORDER BY "Matches" DESC

panels.title: Extractor used (v4 + v6)

panels.description: Reservations being claimed by more than one distinct client identity in the selected time range. High distinct-ID counts can indicate MAC/DUID spoofing or multiple devices behind a CPE all trying to claim the same reservation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'v4' AS "Proto", toString(reservation_ipv4) AS "Reservation", uniqExact(mac_address) AS "Distinct IDs", count() AS "Requests", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed", arrayStringConcat(arraySlice(groupUniqArray(mac_address), 1, 5), ', ') AS "Sample identities", max(timestamp) AS "Last seen" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND reservation_ipv4 IS NOT NULL AND mac_address IS NOT NULL GROUP BY reservation_ipv4 HAVING uniqExact(mac_address) > 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'v6' AS "Proto", toString(reservation_ipv6_na) AS "Reservation", greatest(uniqExact(mac_address), uniqExact(client_id)) AS "Distinct IDs", count() AS "Requests", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed", arrayStringConcat(arraySlice(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', arrayDistinct(arrayConcat(groupUniqArray(coalesce(client_id, '')), groupUniqArray(coalesce(mac_address, ''))))), 1, 5), ', ') AS "Sample identities", max(timestamp) AS "Last seen" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND reservation_ipv6_na IS NOT NULL GROUP BY reservation_ipv6_na HAVING uniqExact(mac_address) > 1 OR uniqExact(client_id) > 1) ORDER BY "Distinct IDs" DESC, "Requests" DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Reservation churn (v4 + v6)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT host_name FROM (SELECT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v4 UNION ALL SELECT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v6) WHERE host_name != '' ORDER BY host_name
list.label: Server
list.name: host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT host_name FROM (SELECT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v4 UNION ALL SELECT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v6) WHERE host_name != '' ORDER BY host_name
